info.title: agentpay tools
info.description: Pay-per-tool-call HTTP API. Each call settles in USDC on Solana via x402. Configure the operator's agentpay mcp-server (default port 4021) and expose a public URL via ngrok or similar before importing into a Custom GPT.

servers.description: Replace with the public URL of your agentpay mcp-server

post.summary: Reverse a string (costs 0.001 USDC, paid via x402 on Solana)

200.description: Reversed string returned after payment is settled

402.description: Payment required. The PAYMENT-REQUIRED header carries x402 v2 payment requirements. The GPT must re-issue the request with an X-PAYMENT header containing a signed payload. See github.com/krystiangw/agentpay.

post.summary: Count words in a string (costs 0.0005 USDC)

200.description: Word count returned after payment is settled
